# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: 'konghq.org/v1'  # define the api version used by Kong (default to v2)
kind: 'KongPlugin'           # should be defined in a plugin file with an .hcl extension, e.g., kong-plugin-example.conf.yaml or similar name according your setup
metadata:                     
  namespace: example          # define the Kong API Gateway where to create this configuration (default is 'kong')  
specs:                        
    consumer_of :               # consumers are defined in a .hcl file, e.g., kong-consumer-example.conf and should be included here as an array of strings or objects 
      - exampleConsumer           # name must match the filename without extension (e.g.: myconfig)  
    plugin:                    # plugins can also go in a .hcl file, e.g., kong-plugin-example.conf and should be included here as an array of strings or objects 
      - examplePlugin            # name must match the filename without extension (e.g.: myconfig)
